response.overview: The story follows Safia, a self-defense martial arts athlete who is forced to fight for her life to save her kidnapped nephew. Around 7:00 AM, Safia (Farali Khan) and her nephew Adam (Adam Darwisyh) are on their way to a hotel to meet her friend Desi (Chintya Chandranaya) and then to the airport for a holiday to Desi's hometown. While traveling to the hotel, Safia's car is stopped by a group of men who threaten her and rob her bag and mobile phone. Bentayan kidnaps Adam while Safia attempts to fight back but is forced to surrender to prevent Adam from being shot. Safia tries to follow them but unfortunately, when they reach an intersection, they become separated. Safia faces numerous challenges as she attempts to track them down.
response.title: Tujuh Dua Belas
